# MDE v1.3.1

## Features

- Adds multi-window workspace support so opening a new workspace, standalone Markdown file, or external dragged path can launch in its own MDE window.
- Adds compact open-in-new-window actions for recent workspaces and recent standalone files in the workspace manager.

## Bug Fixes

- Stabilizes release E2E runs by giving each Electron test launch an isolated user data directory, preventing active-workspace state from leaking between test cases.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Keeps the failed `v1.3.0` release tag untouched and republishes the same user-facing multi-window work through `v1.3.1`.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run build`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts for Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
- Windows NSIS installer artifacts.
